issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
The skill is vendor-locked to Azure, limiting applicability to other cloud providers.

scenarios.name: setup-storage-account-with-lifecycle
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets every rubric requirement; Response A omits several mandatory flags and options.

scenarios.name: bulk-sync-and-python-sas
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric items, while Response A lacks the required azcopy sync and copy commands and uses a different BlobServiceClient constructor.
